ham.subject: Company Leave Policy Update – Effective May 1, 2026
ham.body:
Hi Team,

We are pleased to announce that the Company Leave Policy has been updated and will take effect from May 1, 2026. The key changes include:

- Increasing annual paid leave from 10 to 12 days.
- Introducing a new remote work allowance policy.
- Simplifying the leave request submission process via the HR portal.

Please review the detailed policy document attached and familiarize yourself with the new procedures. If you have any questions, reach out to HR at hr@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,

HR Department
